description_long: This is a curved, sectional-style sofa with a semi-circular footprint, designed for communal or lounge seating in urban environments. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a dark, tufted material that gives a plush, quilted appearance, suggesting comfort and luxury. The outer frame is clad in a wood-textured finish, bordered by a thick, black, textured band that adds visual contrast and structural definition. The sofa lacks visible legs, giving it a grounded, monolithic look, and the armrests are integrated into the continuous curve of the frame, rising only slightly above the seat. The backrest is moderately high and follows the curve of the seat, with deep tufting that enhances its visual depth. This piece is likely intended for placement in public spaces such as lobbies, parks, or upscale waiting areas.
description: A curved, tufted sofa with a dark quilted seat and backrest, encased in a wood-textured frame with black textured borders. The design is monolithic and luxurious, suitable for communal urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep, tufted seat and backrest, with the curved wood-textured frame and black border clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the thick, textured black border and the wood-textured exterior, with the seat partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wood-textured back and the prominent black border, with no seat or tufting visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view from the opposite direction, again showing the wood-textured frame and black border, with a glimpse of the tufted interior.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single continuous seat and back cushion, both deeply tufted and attached, forming a unified, semi-circular seating area.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, low-profile armrests that rise slightly from the seat and follow the curve of the sofa, with no distinct padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears solid and continuous, giving a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Moderately high, continuous curved backrest with deep tufting, seamlessly integrated with the seat and frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Deeply tufted, quilted upholstery with a diamond pattern, creating a plush and textured visual effect.
